analysis: Agent 0 and Agent 1 both encountered syntax errors in their implementations. Agent 2 failed due to an LLM error, and Agent 3 also had syntax issues. The genetic algorithm and simulated annealing approaches need refinement. Particle swarm optimization was not attempted successfully. We need to explore alternative methods and refine existing ones.

assignments.direction: Refine the genetic algorithm implementation by ensuring proper syntax and structure. Focus on improving the mutation and crossover operations to enhance exploration and exploitation.
Enhance the simulated annealing approach by fixing syntax errors and optimizing the cooling rate and initial temperature settings. Aim to improve convergence and solution quality.
Implement a new heuristic-based approach, such as the Shortest Processing Time (SPT) rule, to minimize total tardiness. Evaluate its performance across different instance sizes.
Develop a hybrid approach combining elements of tabu search with local search techniques to explore the search space more effectively. Test its performance on various job scheduling instances.
